title: QuoteRequest
description: A request to a venue for a quote on a single size bucket (SPEC §4.2). A venue MUST treat each request independently and MUST NOT be able to derive the taker's total intent from it (SPEC §4.2, §7).

give.description: The asset and the size for THIS request (a bucket), not the taker's total.

want.description: The asset the taker wants in return.

deadline.description: Responses MUST be returned before this; late responses MUST be ignored (SPEC §5).
